items.title: Drift links $280 million exploit to six-month social engineering op run by suspected North Korean actors
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $280 million exploit linked to North Korean actors highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi protocols, impacting investor confidence and SOL's ecosystem stability.

items.title: Drift says $270 million exploit was a six-month North Korean intelligence operation
items.whyYouShouldCare: The revelation of a six-month intelligence operation targeting Drift underscores the need for enhanced security measures within the Solana ecosystem to protect liquidity.

items.title: Drift Protocol $280M exploit took 'months of deliberate preparation'
items.whyYouShouldCare: The extensive preparation behind the Drift exploit raises concerns about the sophistication of threats facing DeFi projects on Solana, potentially affecting user engagement.
